text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, January 25. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
